chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1818 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of M.A. No.10693/2014. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.12.2025 Mr. Malik Bux Mari, associate/partner of Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, advocate for petitioners. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. == Learned counsel for the petitioners, under the instructions, does not press this petition. Accordingly, present petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
